title: CNBC Daily Open: Trump posts expletive-filled Iran threats on Easter Sunday
summary_full: Oil prices rise again as President Donald Trump steps up his threats against Iran if Tehran does not come to a deal on the Strait of Hormuz.
summary_public: Oil prices rise again as President Donald Trump steps up his threats against Iran if Tehran does not come to a deal on the Strait of Hormuz.

IR.label: negative
